_provenance: schema-derived from math re-audit finding OPTUNA-2 (MEDIUM) + feature-plans/decision-science/engine-audit/pruner-choice/plan.md — pin the autotuner's Optuna pruner to NopPruner so the BHY haircut + N_effective additive accounting both retain the complete-trial-set assumption, and a future trial.report addition cannot silently activate MedianPruner.

_sites.anchor: main create_study call (currently around autotuner.py:1562); located by AST, not line number
calibration create_study call (currently around autotuner.py:1940); located by AST, not line number

constants._pruner_family_label_naming: Must live as a module-level named constant in autotuner.py (per project Coding Standards: 'every constant named + source comment'). The implementation is free to name the symbol itself (e.g. _ACTIVE_OPTUNA_PRUNER_FAMILY or ACTIVE_OPTUNA_PRUNER_FAMILY); this fixture pins the VALUE only.
constants._expected_pruner_class_rationale: NopPruner is the only no-op pruner in Optuna. MedianPruner, HyperbandPruner, SuccessiveHalvingPruner, PercentilePruner, ThresholdPruner, PatientPruner all act on intermediate trial.report() values; with no reports the default MedianPruner is silently inactive today but would silently activate the moment a developer adds trial.report — censoring the BHY haircut's complete-trial-set assumption.

pruner_contract._kwarg_name_rationale: optuna.create_study(...) accepts pruner= as a kwarg; the fix pins it explicitly at every call site rather than relying on the implicit default.
pruner_contract._prohibited_default_rationale: MedianPruner is Optuna's implicit default. The OPTUNA-2 finding is that the implicit default silently activates if a future trial.report appears — invalidating BHY's c(N) Yekutieli factor (calibrated over the COMPLETE trial set) and the N_effective additive accounting (which sums across the FULL set of completed trials).

static_guard_contract._purpose: Plan D3/T3: autotuner.py source must NOT contain trial.report or .should_prune at any line. Adding either is a methodology change that must surface to PM before merge.
static_guard_contract.scope: autotuner.py source only — other modules may legitimately reference these substrings in tests or docs

source_comment_contract._purpose: Plan T4: the pruner= kwarg must be accompanied by a comment block that cites the BHY haircut + N_effective additive accounting rationale. The comment is what makes the methodology-change-discipline visible at PR review time.
source_comment_contract._substrings_any_rationale: At least one of these tokens must appear within ~15 source lines of each pruner=... pin, so the rationale is auditable at the call site without tracing constants.
source_comment_contract._must_also_mention_rationale: The N_effective additive accounting is the second math layer that depends on the complete trial set; the comment must cite both dependencies, not just BHY.

behavioural_contract._strategy: Construct each study via the exposed call site (or a helper), then inspect study.pruner. The assertion is type-based (isinstance NopPruner / not MedianPruner) — never a magic property value.
